author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 0.15.6 - Housekeeping: the driver version now matches the package version after an update (earlier packaging/engine fixes did not change the driver file, so its header lagged). No functional change from 0.15.5.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, HomeKit, HAP, Local, Sensor

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Thermostat
drivers.description: Local controller for an ecobee thermostat over the HomeKit Accessory Protocol (HAP): mode, setpoints, temperature, humidity, operating state, and fan.

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Remote Sensor
drivers.description: Child device for ecobee remote sensors (temperature, occupancy, motion, battery). Created automatically by the thermostat driver.
